text.title: Solo Launch Day Procedure
text.summary: 7-checkpoint procedure to execute the launch-day runbook end-to-end.

step.name: t-minus-24h-preflight
step.action: Full smoke test against production (signup, payment, welcome email, support email, password reset). Rollback dry run. Fallback content frozen + reviewed. Stripe live keys provisioned (NOT swapped).

step.name: t-minus-2h-final-checks
step.action: Smoke-test rerun. Stripe key swap from test→live. $1 verify charge with founder card. Refund the verify charge. Confirm webhook signing-key matches live. Monitoring alert path tested.
step.decision-gate: If any check fails → DEFER announce by ≥1h while fixing. Never announce with a red pre-check.

step.name: t-zero-announce
step.action: Mailing list first, then X / LinkedIn / IndieHackers / Product Hunt. Plausible live counter open. tg-bot ping armed.

step.name: t-plus-15m-1h-4h-checkpoints
step.action: Per checkpoint: capture errors_count, signups_count, paid_count, observations, actions_taken. Update log via tg-bot ping.

step.name: change-freeze
step.action: NO deploys, NO env-var changes, NO DNS swaps unless triggered by an incident requiring rollback. Improvements wait until T+24h.
step.output: No rogue change in the change log.
step.decision-gate: If rollback is triggered → execute the documented ≤10-min path; record triggered_at + steps_taken + reverted_at + outcome.

step.name: t-plus-12h-closeout-start
step.action: Final-day checkpoint. Decide: continue active monitoring vs hand off to async. Sleep is mandatory if past midnight local time.

step.name: t-plus-24h-postmortem
step.action: Final checkpoint. Closeout: paid_signups, total_signups, errors, top_3_learnings, runbook_updates. Validate the execution log.
